verses.text: Tua ni ciangin nupi sagih in papi khat neikhawm ding uh a, “Kote in komau' an ciat ne-in, komau' puan ciat mah ka silh ding uh hi. Kote pen, nangma zi cih min bek hong puasak in; ka minsiatna teng uh hong hum in,” ci ding uh hi.
Tua ni ciangin Topa' bulsel pen melhoihin minthang ding a, leitung panin a piang gahte pen, a suakta lai Israel mite' kiphatsakna leh minthan'na hi ding hi

Topa in thukhenna leh meihalna tawh Zion mite' mawhna teng siangsakin, Jerusalem khuasung panin mi thahna teng a beisak ciangin Zion-ah a omlai mi, Jerusalem-ah khang tawntungin a om dingin a kiciamtehsa mite khempeuh, a siangtho kici ding hi
Tua ciangin Zion Mual tung, tua lai-a kikhawm mi khempeuh tungah, sunin meii sungah, zanin meikuang khu tawh Topa hong kilang ding a, Topa' minthan'na vang in khuapi hu ding hi
Tua minthan'na vang pen sun ciangin nisa a liah ding leh huihpi guahpi panin bukna leh belhna zong hi ding hi.
